+    let blocks = [];
+    let obstacles = [];
+    let nextBlockX = 0;
+    const blockWidth = 60;
+    const blockHeight = 40;
+
+    // Collision Detection (AABB)
+    function checkCollision(r1, r2) {
+      return r1.x < r2.x + r2.width &&
+             r1.x + r1.width > r2.x &&
+             r1.y < r2.y + r2.height &&
+             r1.y + r1.height > r2.y;
+    }

     // Main Game Loop
     function update() {
       if (gameState !== 'playing') return;
@@ -183,7 +183,90 @@
       survivalTime = (now - startTime) / 1000;
       timeElement.textContent = survivalTime.toFixed(1);
 
-      // --- Physics & Object Update logic here ---
+      // スピードアップ（徐々に難易度を上げる）
+      scrollSpeed = 5 + (survivalTime / 10);
+
+      // --- プレイヤーの物理演算 ---
+      player.vy += gravity;
+      player.y += player.vy;
+
+      // --- 地形・障害物のスクロール ---
+      for (let i = 0; i < blocks.length; i++) {
+        blocks[i].x -= scrollSpeed;
+      }
+      for (let i = 0; i < obstacles.length; i++) {
+        obstacles[i].x -= scrollSpeed;
+      }
+
+      // --- 当たり判定（地面） ---
+      let onGround = false;
+      for (const block of blocks) {
+        if (checkCollision(player, block)) {
+          // 上から乗った場合
+          if (player.vy > 0 && player.y + player.height - player.vy <= block.y + 5) {
+            player.y = block.y - player.height;
+            player.vy = 0;
+            player.jumpCount = 0; // 着地したらジャンプ回数をリセット
+            onGround = true;
+          } else {
+            // 横からぶつかった場合（壁としてゲームオーバー）
+            gameOver();
+            return;
+          }
+        }
+      }
+
+      // --- 当たり判定（障害物） ---
+      for (const obs of obstacles) {
+        if (checkCollision(player, obs)) {
+          gameOver();
+          return;
+        }
+      }
+
+      // --- 落下判定 ---
+      if (player.y > canvas.height) {
+        gameOver();
+        return;
+      }
+
+      // --- メモリ最適化＆新しいブロックの生成 ---
+      // 画面外に出たブロックを削除
+      blocks = blocks.filter(b => b.x + b.width > 0);
+      obstacles = obstacles.filter(o => o.x + o.width > 0);
+
+      // 右端のブロックが画面内に入ってきたら新しいブロックを生成
+      const lastBlock = blocks[blocks.length - 1];
+      let currentRight = lastBlock ? lastBlock.x + lastBlock.width : 0;
+      
+      while (currentRight < canvas.width + blockWidth) {
+        // 穴を作る確率（15%）
+        const isHole = Math.random() < 0.15;
+        
+        if (!isHole) {
+          const groundY = canvas.height - blockHeight;
+          blocks.push({
+            x: currentRight,
+            y: groundY,
+            width: blockWidth,
+            height: blockHeight
+          });
+
+          // 障害物を作る確率（10%）
+          // 穴の直後などには作らないように調整
+          if (Math.random() < 0.10 && currentRight > canvas.width) {
+            obstacles.push({
+              x: currentRight + blockWidth / 2 - 15,
+              y: groundY - 30, // 地面の上に乗るように配置
+              width: 30,
+              height: 30
+            });
+          }
+        } else {
+          // 穴の場合はブロックを作らないが、currentRight は進める
+        }
+        currentRight += blockWidth;
+      }
     }

+    // 半円を左右に描き、その間を塗りつぶすことで横長の楕円を表現します
+    function drawRoundedRect(ctx, x, y, width, height) {
+      const r = height / 2;
+      ctx.beginPath();
+      // 左側の半円
+      ctx.arc(x + r, y + r, r, Math.PI * 0.5, Math.PI * 1.5);
+      // 右側の半円
+      ctx.arc(x + width - r, y + r, r, Math.PI * 1.5, Math.PI * 0.5);
+      ctx.closePath();
+      ctx.fill();
+    }

 ## 2. タワーディフェンス（横スクロール）の雛形
 - **パス**: `src/pages/portfolio/tower-defense/index.astro`
-- **使用技術**: HTML5 Canvas + 素のJavaScript (オブジェクト指向/Class)
-- **学習テーマ**: 「オブジェクトの配列管理」と「状態遷移」
-- **実装内容**:
-  - ※今回はPhaser.jsは使わず、あえて素のJavaScriptで**「どうやって複数のキャラを管理するか（Class設計）」**が学べる作りにします。
-  - お金（コスト）が時間経過で貯まり、ボタンを押すと味方キャラが左端から生成される。
-  - 右端からは定期的に敵キャラが生成される。
-  - キャラ同士がぶつかると「歩行」から「攻撃」状態に遷移し、HPが減っていくロジック。
-  - （ここからユーザー自身で「遠距離攻撃キャラ」や「足の速い敵」などをClassをコピーして量産できるように作ります）
+- **使用技術**: HTML + Phaser.js (CDN経由で読み込み)
+- **学習テーマ**: 「本格ゲームエンジン（Phaser）の基礎」と「物理演算を用いた衝突判定」
+- **実装内容**:
+  - Phaser.js の基本構造（`preload`, `create`, `update`）の解説と雛形。
+  - Phaser内蔵の物理エンジン（Arcade Physics）を用いた味方と敵の生成・移動。
+  - オブジェクト同士が衝突した際の状態遷移（歩く→攻撃する）のイベント処理。
+  - （ここからご自身で「Phaserの公式ドキュメント」を読みながら、スプライトアニメーションの追加や、新しいキャラクタークラスの作成に挑戦できるようにします）
 
 ## ディレクトリ構成の準備
 各ページと同じ階層に、アセットを入れるための空フォルダを準備します。

+    function useItem(itemId) {
+      if (!isPlayerTurn || isGameOver) return;
+      const itemState = player.items.find(i => i.id === itemId);

+        player.poison = 0;
+        player.hp = Math.min(player.maxHp, player.hp + 1);

+          enemy.poison = (enemy.poison || 0) + 1;
+          logMessage('アイテム「香水」を使用し、敵に毒1を付与した！', 'log-poison');
+        }
+      }
+
+      updateUI();
+    }

+    function selectReward(id) {
+      player.discard.push({ ...CARD_DB[id] });
+      logMessage(CARD_DB[id].name + ' をデッキに追加！', 'log-system');
+      
+      // 【レリック・アイテムの自動獲得ロジック】
+      // 3戦ごと（中ボス・ボス戦など）に未所持のレリックを1つ自動獲得
+      if (battleCount % 3 === 0) {
+        const unownedRelics = Object.keys(RELIC_DB).filter(r => !player.relics.includes(r));
+        if (unownedRelics.length > 0) {
+          shuffle(unownedRelics);
+          const newRelicId = unownedRelics[0];
+          player.relics.push(newRelicId);
+          logMessage('強敵を倒した報酬として、レリック「' + RELIC_DB[newRelicId].name + '」を自動獲得した！', 'log-system');
+        }
+      } else {
+        // 通常の戦闘では50%の確率で使用済みアイテムが1つ自動で補充される
+        if (Math.random() < 0.50) {
+          const usedItems = player.items.filter(i => i.used).map(i => i.id);
+          if (usedItems.length > 0) {
+            shuffle(usedItems);
+            const refillItemId = usedItems[0];
+            const itemState = player.items.find(i => i.id === refillItemId);
+            if (itemState) {
+              itemState.used = false;
+              logMessage('戦闘勝利のボーナスとして、アイテム「' + ITEM_DB[refillItemId].name + '」が補充された！', 'log-system');
+            }
+          }
+        }
+      }
+
       if (rewardOverlay) rewardOverlay.style.display = 'none';
       showResultOverlay(true);
     }

+    // --- 4. 画面切り替え ---
+    function showScreen(target) {
+      // 全画面をいったん隠す
+      const screens = [
+        startScreen, classSelectScreen, mapScreen, innScreen, 
+        fairyScreen, townScreen, eventScreen, document.querySelector('.battle-layout')
+      ];
+      screens.forEach(s => { if (s) s.style.display = 'none'; });
+
+      // ヘッダーバーの表示制御
+      if (target === startScreen || target === classSelectScreen) {
+        if (gameHeader) gameHeader.style.display = 'none';
+      } else {
+        if (gameHeader) gameHeader.style.display = 'flex';
+      }
+
+      // 対象画面を表示
+      if (target) {
+        if (target === document.querySelector('.battle-layout')) {
+          target.style.display = 'block';
+        } else {
+          target.style.display = 'flex';
+        }
+      }
+
+      updateHeaderBar();
+    }
+
+    function updateHeaderBar() {
+      if (headerFloor) headerFloor.textContent = `エリア ${currentArea} - ${currentFloor}層`;
+      if (headerGold) headerGold.textContent = player.gold;
+      if (headerHp) headerHp.textContent = `${player.hp}/${player.maxHp}`;
+      if (headerMp) headerMp.textContent = `${player.mp}/${player.maxMp}`;
+
+      // ヘッダーのレリックリスト更新
+      if (headerRelicsList) {
+        headerRelicsList.innerHTML = '';
+        if (player.relics.length === 0) {
+          headerRelicsList.innerHTML = '<span style="color:var(--text-muted);">なし</span>';
+        } else {
+          player.relics.forEach(relicId => {
+            const relic = RELIC_DB[relicId];
+            if (relic) {
+              const img = document.createElement('img');
+              img.src = relic.image;
+              img.alt = relic.name;
+              img.title = `${relic.name}: ${relic.desc}`;
+              img.style.width = '18px';
+              img.style.height = '18px';
+              img.style.objectFit = 'contain';
+              headerRelicsList.appendChild(img);
+            }
+          });
+        }
+      }
+    }
+
+    // --- 5. ゲーム開始・セットアップ ---
+    let selectedClass = 'yuusya';
+    let selectedRelic = '';
+    let selectedClassRelicsPool = [];
+
+    function setupClassSelection() {
+      selectedClass = 'yuusya';
+      selectedRelic = '';
+      
+      // クラスカードの選択イベント
+      const classCards = document.querySelectorAll('.class-card');
+      classCards.forEach(card => {
+        card.classList.remove('selected');
+        if (card.dataset.class === 'yuusya') card.classList.add('selected');
+        
+        card.addEventListener('click', () => {
+          classCards.forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
+          card.classList.add('selected');
+          selectedClass = card.dataset.class;
+          setupRelicSelection();
+        });
+      });
+
+      setupRelicSelection();
+    }
+
+    function setupRelicSelection() {
+      const container = document.getElementById('relic-select-container');
+      if (!container) return;
+
+      container.innerHTML = '';
+      // ランダムに3つのレリックをプールから選ぶ
+      const allRelicKeys = Object.keys(RELIC_DB);
+      shuffle(allRelicKeys);
+      selectedClassRelicsPool = allRelicKeys.slice(0, 3);
+
+      selectedClassRelicsPool.forEach((relicId, index) => {
+        const relic = RELIC_DB[relicId];
+        const div = document.createElement('div');
+        div.className = 'relic-select-card';
+        div.style.cssText = 'border: 1px solid #333; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 0.4rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; flex: 1; transition: all 0.2s ease;';
+        if (index === 0) {
+          div.style.borderColor = '#ffb84d';
+          div.style.background = 'rgba(255,184,77,0.1)';
+          selectedRelic = relicId;
+        }
+
+        div.innerHTML = `
+          <img src="${relic.image}" style="width: 24px; height: 24px; object-fit: contain; margin-bottom: 0.2rem;" />
+          <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: bold;">${relic.name}</div>
+          <div style="font-size: 0.6rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 0.1rem;">${relic.desc}</div>
+        `;
+
+        div.addEventListener('click', () => {
+          container.querySelectorAll('.relic-select-card').forEach(c => {
+            c.style.borderColor = '#333';
+            c.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
+          });
+          div.style.borderColor = '#ffb84d';
+          div.style.background = 'rgba(255,184,77,0.1)';
+          selectedRelic = relicId;
+        });
+
+        container.appendChild(div);
+      });
+    }
+
+    function initGame() {
+      // プレイヤーデータのセットアップ
+      player.class = selectedClass;
+      player.gold = 50;
+      player.relics = [selectedRelic];
+      player.items = [
+        { id: 'sandwich', used: false },
+        { id: 'elixir', used: false },
+        { id: 'perfume', used: false }
+      ];
+
+      // 職業ごとの初期ステータス
+      if (player.class === 'yuusya') {
+        player.maxHp = 10;
+        player.maxMp = 5;
+        // 勇者は初期レリックが追加で1つランダムに手に入る
+        const remainRelics = Object.keys(RELIC_DB).filter(r => r !== selectedRelic);
+        shuffle(remainRelics);
+        player.relics.push(remainRelics[0]);
+      } else if (player.class === 'kenshi') {
+        player.maxHp = 15;
+        player.maxMp = 4;
+      } else if (player.class === 'mahoutsukai') {
+        player.maxHp = 7;
+        player.maxMp = 7;
+      } else if (player.class === 'butouka') {
+        player.maxHp = 8;
+        player.maxMp = 4;
+      }
+
+      player.hp = player.maxHp;
+      player.mp = player.maxMp;
+      player.poison = 0;
+      player.paralyze = 0;
+      player.buffUp = 0;
+      player.buffDown = 0;
+
+      // 初期デッキの構築
+      const deckIds = INITIAL_DECKS[player.class] || INITIAL_DECKS['yuusya'];
+      player.deck = deckIds.map(id => ({ ...CARD_DB[id] }));
+      player.discard = [];
+      player.hand = [];
+
+      currentArea = 1;
+      currentFloor = 0;
+
+      showMapScreen();
+    }
+
+    // --- 6. マップ進行処理 ---
+    const pathNames = {
+      'battle': '通常戦闘 ⚔️',
+      'elite': '強敵戦闘 💀',
+      'mimic': 'ミミック強襲 📦',
+      'inn': '旅人の宿 ⛺',
+      'fairy': '祝福の妖精 🧚',
+      'event': '未知のイベント ❓',
+      'town': 'よろず街 🛒',
+      'midboss': '中ボス戦 👿',
+      'boss': 'エリアボス戦 👑',
+      'lastboss': '魔王決戦 👹'
+    };
+
+    function showMapScreen() {
+      showScreen(mapScreen);
+      if (mapPathsContainer) mapPathsContainer.innerHTML = '';
+
+      // 次の層に進む
+      const nextFloor = currentFloor + 1;
+      let nextPaths = [];
+
+      // 階層ごとの固定イベントチェック
+      if (nextFloor === 4) {
+        // エリア1, 3は街、エリア2は中ボス
+        nextPaths = [ (currentArea === 2) ? 'midboss' : 'town' ];
+      } else if (nextFloor === 5) {
+        // エリア1, 3は中ボス、エリア2は街
+        nextPaths = [ (currentArea === 2) ? 'town' : 'midboss' ];
+      } else if (nextFloor === 9) {
+        // ボスフロア
+        nextPaths = [ (currentArea === 3) ? 'lastboss' : 'boss' ];
+      } else {
+        // 通常の分岐階層 (ランダムに3本の道を作る)
+        const types = ['battle', 'elite', 'mimic', 'inn', 'fairy', 'event'];
+        shuffle(types);
+        nextPaths = types.slice(0, 3);
+      }
+
+      nextPaths.forEach(type => {
+        const btn = document.createElement('button');
+        btn.className = 'btn btn-primary';
+        btn.style.width = '100%';
+        btn.style.padding = '0.8rem';
+        btn.style.fontSize = '0.9rem';
+        btn.textContent = pathNames[type];
+
+        // 各種マスごとの枠線色など
+        if (type === 'elite') btn.style.borderColor = '#fa5252';
+        if (type === 'mimic') btn.style.borderColor = '#fab005';
+        if (type === 'boss' || type === 'midboss' || type === 'lastboss') btn.style.borderColor = '#cc5de8';
+        if (type === 'inn') btn.style.borderColor = '#51cf66';
+        if (type === 'fairy') btn.style.borderColor = '#cc5de8';
+        if (type === 'town') btn.style.borderColor = '#fd7e14';
+
+        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+          currentFloor = nextFloor;
+          currentPathType = type;
+          enterFloorNode();
+        });
+        if (mapPathsContainer) mapPathsContainer.appendChild(btn);
+      });
+    }
+
+    function enterFloorNode() {
+      if (currentPathType === 'battle' || currentPathType === 'elite' || currentPathType === 'mimic' || currentPathType === 'midboss' || currentPathType === 'boss' || currentPathType === 'lastboss') {
+        startBattle();
+      } else if (currentPathType === 'inn') {
+        showInnScreen();
+      } else if (currentPathType === 'fairy') {
+        showFairyScreen();
+      } else if (currentPathType === 'town') {
+        showTownScreen();
+      } else if (currentPathType === 'event') {
+        triggerEventNode();
+      }
+    }
+
+    // --- 7. 宿（回復・バッドステータス解除） ---
+    function showInnScreen() {
+      showScreen(innScreen);
+      if (btnInnRest) {
+        btnInnRest.disabled = player.gold < 15;
+        btnInnRest.textContent = `休む (💰15) [現在の所持金: 💰${player.gold}]`;
+      }
+    }
+
+    if (btnInnRest) btnInnRest.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      if (player.gold >= 15) {
+        player.gold -= 15;
+        player.hp = player.maxHp;
+        player.poison = 0;
+        player.paralyze = 0;
+        alert('HPが全回復し、すべてのバッドステータスが治療されました！');
+        proceedNextFloor();
+      }
+    });
+
+    if (btnInnLeave) btnInnLeave.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      proceedNextFloor();
+    });
+
+    // --- 8. 妖精（カード強化） ---
+    function showFairyScreen() {
+      showScreen(fairyScreen);
+      if (fairyCardList) {
+        fairyCardList.innerHTML = '';
+        
+        // 強化可能な（まだ「+」になっていない）カードだけをリスト化
+        const targets = [...player.deck, ...player.discard, ...player.hand];
+        const upgradableCards = targets.filter(c => !c.upgraded);
+
+        if (upgradableCards.length === 0) {
+          fairyCardList.innerHTML = '<div style="grid-column: span 3; font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted); text-align:center; padding:1rem;">強化可能なカードがありません</div>';
+        } else {
+          // 重複表示を防ぐため一意のカード配列として扱う
+          const uniqueIds = Array.from(new Set(upgradableCards.map(c => c.id)));
+          
+          uniqueIds.forEach(id => {
+            const card = CARD_DB[id];
+            const btn = document.createElement('div');
+            btn.className = `battle-card color-${card.color}`;
+            btn.style.cssText = 'width: 100%; height: 110px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; margin: 0; box-sizing: border-box;';
+            btn.innerHTML = `
+              <div class="card-cost">${card.cost}</div>
+              <div class="card-name" style="font-size:0.7rem;">${card.name}</div>
+              <div class="card-desc" style="font-size:0.55rem; line-height:1.2;">${card.desc}</div>
+            `;
+
+            if (player.gold >= 20) {
+              btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+                if (confirm(`「${card.name}」を 20ゴールドで強化しますか？`)) {
+                  player.gold -= 20;
+                  // デッキ内の対象カードを1枚強化版に変換
+                  let index = player.deck.findIndex(c => c.id === id && !c.upgraded);
+                  if (index !== -1) {
+                    player.deck[index] = upgradeCard(player.deck[index]);
+                  } else {
+                    index = player.discard.findIndex(c => c.id === id && !c.upgraded);
+                    if (index !== -1) {
+                      player.discard[index] = upgradeCard(player.discard[index]);
+                    } else {
+                      index = player.hand.findIndex(c => c.id === id && !c.upgraded);
+                      if (index !== -1) player.hand[index] = upgradeCard(player.hand[index]);
+                    }
+                  }
+                  alert(`「${card.name}」が強化され「${card.name}+」になりました！`);
+                  proceedNextFloor();
+                }
+              });
+            } else {
+              btn.style.opacity = '0.4';
+              btn.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
+            }
+
+            fairyCardList.appendChild(btn);
+          });
+        }
+      }

+    function renderShop() {

+                const target = player.items.find(i => i.id === shopItem.id);

+          btn.className = 'btn btn-primary';

+          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {

+            if (!opt.isCustomNav) proceedNextFloor();
+          });
+          container.appendChild(btn);
+        });
+      }
+    }

+    function proceedNextFloor() {
+      if (currentFloor >= 9) {
+        // 各エリアのボスを倒した際のエリア移行処理
+        if (currentPathType === 'boss') {
+          // エリア移行
+          currentArea++;
+          currentFloor = 0;
+          player.hp = Math.min(player.maxHp, player.hp + Math.floor(player.maxHp / 2)); // HP半分回復
+          alert(`エリア ${currentArea} に到達しました！HPが最大値の半分回復しました。`);
+          showMapScreen();
+        } else if (currentPathType === 'lastboss') {
+          // ラスボス撃破は直接 handleVictory 内でクリア画面へ移行するためここには来ない
+        }
+      } else {
+        showMapScreen();
+      }
+    }

     function setEnemyIntent() {
       if (!enemy || enemy.hp <= 0) return;
-      const v = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3) - 1; 
-      const base = enemy.attackBase + Math.floor((battleCount - 1) / 3);

+      const chosen = availableSkills[Math.floor(Math.random() * availableSkills.length)];
+
+      let dmg = enemy.attackBase + Math.floor((battleCount - 1) / 3);
+      if (chosen === 'fire_attack') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'fire_attack', damage: dmg + 2, desc: '火炎ブレス' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'ice_attack') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'ice_attack', damage: dmg + 1, desc: '絶対零度' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'rush') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'rush', damage: Math.max(1, Math.floor(dmg / 2)), hits: 2, desc: '突進連撃' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'paralyze') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'paralyze', damage: 0, desc: '痺れ粉 (麻痺付与)' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'poison') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'poison', damage: 0, desc: '毒液' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'heal') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'heal', damage: 0, desc: '自己再生' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'buff_up') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'buff_up', damage: 0, desc: '魔力昇華 (能昇)' };
+      } else if (chosen === 'buff_down') {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'buff_down', damage: 0, desc: '重力波 (能降)' };
+      } else {
+        enemy.intent = { type: 'attack', damage: dmg, desc: '通常攻撃' };
+      }
+    }
+
+    function calculateDamage(baseVal, element, isPlayerAttacking) {
+      let bonus = 0;
+
+      if (isPlayerAttacking) {
+        // プレイヤー攻撃時
+        if (player.relics.includes('game_ken')) bonus += 1;
+        if (player.buffUp > 0) bonus += 1;
+        if (player.buffDown > 0) bonus -= 1;
+
+        let dmg = baseVal + bonus;
+
+        // 隕石(meteor)は敵の弱点をすべて突く
+        if (element === 'fire' && CARD_DB['meteor'].id === 'meteor') {
+          // メテオの時、敵の弱点リストに炎、氷、雷のいずれかがあれば弱点適用
+          const hasWeakness = enemy.weaknesses.includes('fire') || enemy.weaknesses.includes('ice') || enemy.weaknesses.includes('thunder');
+          if (hasWeakness) dmg = Math.floor(dmg * 1.5);
+        } else {
+          // 通常属性倍率
+          if (enemy.weaknesses.includes(element)) {
+            dmg = Math.floor(dmg * 1.5);
+            logMessage('弱点属性！ダメージ1.5倍！', 'log-heal');
+          } else if (enemy.resistances.includes(element)) {
+            dmg = Math.floor(dmg * 0.5);
+            logMessage('耐性あり。ダメージ半減', 'log-poison');
+          } else if (enemy.immunities.includes(element)) {
+            dmg = 0;
+            logMessage('無効化されました！', 'log-poison');
+          }
+        }
+
+        // ゴーレム被ダメージ半減
+        if (enemy.isGolem) {
+          dmg = Math.floor(dmg / 2);
+          logMessage('ゴーレムの鉄壁！被ダメージ半減。', 'log-poison');
+        }
+
+        return Math.max(0, dmg);
+      } else {
+        // 敵攻撃時
+        if (player.buffUp > 0) bonus -= 1;
+        if (player.buffDown > 0) bonus += 1;
+
+        // モンスターの属性チェック
+        let dmg = baseVal + bonus;
+        if (element === 'fire') {
+          // プレイヤーに炎耐性レリック等があればここで軽減(将来拡張用)
+        }
+
+        return Math.max(0, dmg);
+      }
     }

+    function showGameAlert(title, message, onOk = null) {
+      if (dialogTitle) dialogTitle.textContent = title;
+      if (dialogMessage) dialogMessage.textContent = message;
+      if (btnDialogOk) btnDialogOk.style.display = 'inline-block';
+      if (btnDialogYes) btnDialogYes.style.display = 'none';
+      if (btnDialogNo) btnDialogNo.style.display = 'none';
+      currentDialogCallback = onOk;
+      if (gameDialogModal) gameDialogModal.style.display = 'flex';
+    }
+
+    function showGameConfirm(title, message, onYes, onNo = null) {
+      if (dialogTitle) dialogTitle.textContent = title;
+      if (dialogMessage) dialogMessage.textContent = message;
+      if (btnDialogOk) btnDialogOk.style.display = 'none';
+      if (btnDialogYes) btnDialogYes.style.display = 'inline-block';
+      if (btnDialogNo) btnDialogNo.style.display = 'inline-block';
+      currentDialogCallback = onYes;

+    // --- 8. 双六マップ生成・描画ロジック ---
+    const NODE_TYPES = {
+      start: { label: '王の間 🏰', class: 'start' },
+      normal: { label: '通常戦 ⚔️', class: 'normal' },
+      elite: { label: '強敵戦 💀', class: 'elite' },

+      lastboss: { label: '魔王 👹', class: 'lastboss' }

+
+    function generateAreaMap() {
+      generatedMap = [];
+
+      for (let f = 0; f <= 9; f++) {
+        const floorNodes = [];
+        if (f === 0) {
+          floorNodes.push({ type: 'start', col: 0, row: 0 });
+        } else if (f === 4) {
+          floorNodes.push({ type: 'town', col: 4, row: 0 });
+        } else if (f === 5) {
+          floorNodes.push({ type: 'midboss', col: 5, row: 0 });
+        } else if (f === 9) {
+          const type = (currentArea === 3) ? 'lastboss' : 'boss';
+          floorNodes.push({ type: type, col: 9, row: 0 });
+        } else {
+          const pool = ['normal', 'elite', 'mimic', 'inn', 'fairy', 'event'];
+          shuffle(pool);
+          for (let r = -1; r <= 1; r++) {
+            floorNodes.push({
+              type: pool[r + 1],
+              col: f,
+              row: r
+            });
+          }
+        }
+        generatedMap.push(floorNodes);
+      }
+    }
+
+    function renderBoardMap(container, isBattleModal = false) {
+      if (!container) return;
+      container.innerHTML = '';
+
+      const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
+      svg.style.cssText = 'position: absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; pointer-events:none; z-index:1;';
+      container.appendChild(svg);
+
+      const nodeElements = [];
+
+      generatedMap.forEach((floorNodes, fIndex) => {
+        const columnDiv = document.createElement('div');
+        columnDiv.style.cssText = 'display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; height: 100%; position: relative;';
+
+        floorNodes.forEach((node, nIndex) => {
+          const btn = document.createElement('div');
+          btn.className = 'map-node';
+          btn.textContent = getSymbolForType(node.type);
+          btn.title = NODE_TYPES[node.type].label;
+
+          if (fIndex < currentFloor) {
+            btn.classList.add('completed');
+          } else if (fIndex === currentFloor) {
+            btn.classList.add('completed');
+            const token = document.createElement('img');
+            token.className = 'player-token';
+            token.src = AVATAR_IMAGES[player.class];
+            btn.appendChild(token);
+          }
+
+          const isNextTarget = (fIndex === currentFloor + 1 && !isBattleModal && !isGameOver);
+          if (isNextTarget) {
+            btn.classList.add('active');
+            btn.style.cursor = 'pointer';
+            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
+              currentFloor = fIndex;
+              currentPathType = node.type;
+              enterFloorNode();
+            });
+          }
+
+          columnDiv.appendChild(btn);
+          nodeElements.push({ f: fIndex, r: node.row, element: btn });
+        });
+
+        container.appendChild(columnDiv);
+      });
+
+      setTimeout(() => {
+        const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
+        for (let f = 0; f < generatedMap.length - 1; f++) {
+          const currentNodes = nodeElements.filter(n => n.f === f);
+          const nextNodes = nodeElements.filter(n => n.f === f + 1);
+
+          currentNodes.forEach(curr => {
+            const currRect = curr.element.getBoundingClientRect();
+            const currX = (currRect.left + currRect.width / 2) - containerRect.left + container.scrollLeft;
+            const currY = (currRect.top + currRect.height / 2) - containerRect.top;
+
+            nextNodes.forEach(nxt => {
+              if (currentNodes.length > 1 && nextNodes.length > 1) {
+                if (Math.abs(curr.r - nxt.r) > 1) return;
+              }
+
+              const nxtRect = nxt.element.getBoundingClientRect();
+              const nxtX = (nxtRect.left + nxtRect.width / 2) - containerRect.left + container.scrollLeft;
+              const nxtY = (nxtRect.top + nxtRect.height / 2) - containerRect.top;
+
+              const line = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'line');
+              line.setAttribute('x1', currX);
+              line.setAttribute('y1', currY);
+              line.setAttribute('x2', nxtX);
+              line.setAttribute('y2', nxtY);
+              line.setAttribute('stroke', '#444');
+              line.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
+
+              if (curr.f === currentFloor && nxt.f === currentFloor + 1 && !isBattleModal) {
+                line.setAttribute('stroke', '#ffd700');
+                line.setAttribute('stroke-width', '3');
+                line.style.animation = 'map-pulse 1.5s infinite';
+              } else if (curr.f < currentFloor) {
+                line.setAttribute('stroke', '#4dabf7');
+              }
+              svg.appendChild(line);
+            });
+          });
+        }
+      }, 50);
+    }
+
+    function getSymbolForType(type) {
+      switch (type) {
+        case 'start': return '🏰';
+        case 'normal': return '⚔️';
+        case 'elite': return '💀';
+        case 'mimic': return '📦';
+        case 'inn': return '⛺';
+        case 'fairy': return '🧚';
+        case 'event': return '❓';
+        case 'town': return '🛒';
+        case 'midboss': return '👿';
+        case 'boss': return '👑';
+        case 'lastboss': return '👹';
+        default: return '●';
+      }
+    }

+    function buildCardMainText(card) {
+      if (card.type === 'attack') {
+        const hits = card.hits ? `×${card.hits}` : '';
+        const elem = card.element && card.element !== 'none' ? ` [${getElemLabel(card.element)}]` : '';
+        return `⚔️ ${card.value}${hits}ダメージ${elem}`;
+      } else if (card.healSelf) {
+        return `HP +${card.healSelf} 回復`;
+      } else if (card.draw) {
+        return `カードを${card.draw}枚引く`;
+      } else if (card.buffUp) {
+        return `能昇 ${card.buffUp}ターン付与`;
+      } else if (card.buffDown) {
+        return `敵に能降 ${card.buffDown}ターン`;
+      }
+      return card.desc || '';
+    }
+
+    function buildCardSubTexts(card) {
+      const lines = [];
+      if (card.poison) lines.push(`毒${card.poison}付与`);
+      if (card.paralyze) lines.push('30%で麻痺付与');
+      if (card.oncePerBattle) lines.push('1戦闘1回のみ');
+      return lines;
+    }
+
+    function getElemLabel(elem) {
+      const map = { fire:'炎', ice:'氷', thunder:'雷', wind:'風', earth:'土' };
+      return map[elem] || elem;
+    }
+
+    function getColorLabel(color) {
+      const map = { white:'白(回復)', black:'黒(状異)', red:'赤(炎)', blue:'青(水)', green:'緑(風)', orange:'橙(土)', yellow:'黄(雷)', purple:'紫(特殊)' };
+      return map[color] || color;
+    }
+

+    const COLOR_TO_DOT = {};

-    function shuffle(arr) {
-      for(let i=arr.length-1;i>0;i--){
-        const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));
-        [arr[i],arr[j]]=[arr[j],arr[i]];
-      }
-      return arr;
-    }

     const btnDialogOk = document.getElementById('btn-dialog-ok');
     const btnDialogYes = document.getElementById('btn-dialog-yes');
     const btnDialogNo = document.getElementById('btn-dialog-no');
+    // カットシーン
+    const cutsceneModal    = document.getElementById('cutscene-modal');
+    const cutsceneBg       = document.getElementById('cutscene-bg');
+    const cutscenePortraits = document.getElementById('cutscene-portraits');
+    const cutsceneSpeaker  = document.getElementById('cutscene-speaker');
+    const cutsceneText     = document.getElementById('cutscene-text');
+    const btnCutsceneNext  = document.getElementById('btn-cutscene-next');
+
+    /**
+     * カットシーンを順番に表示するユーティリティ。
+     * @param {Array<{bg?, portraits:[{src,flip?}], speaker:string, lines:string[]}>} scenes
+     * @param {Function} onComplete 全シーン完了後のコールバック
+     */
+    function showCutscene(scenes, onComplete) {
+      if (!cutsceneModal || scenes.length === 0) { onComplete?.(); return; }
+      let si = 0; // scene index
+      let li = 0; // line index
+
+      function render() {
+        const s = scenes[si];
+        // 背景
+        if (cutsceneBg) cutsceneBg.style.backgroundImage = s.bg ? `url('${s.bg}')` : 'none';
+        // ポートレート
+        if (cutscenePortraits) {
+          cutscenePortraits.innerHTML = '';
+          (s.portraits || []).forEach(p => {
+            const img = document.createElement('img');
+            img.src = p.src;
+            img.style.cssText = `height:${p.size||'120px'}; object-fit:contain; ${p.flip ? 'transform:scaleX(-1);' : ''} image-rendering:auto;`;
+            cutscenePortraits.appendChild(img);
+          });
+        }
+        // スピーカー名
+        if (cutsceneSpeaker) cutsceneSpeaker.textContent = s.speaker || '';
+        // テキスト（改行対応）
+        if (cutsceneText) cutsceneText.innerHTML = s.lines[li].replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
+      }
+
+      function onNext() {
+        li++;
+        if (li >= scenes[si].lines.length) {
+          si++;
+          li = 0;
+        }
+        if (si >= scenes.length) {
+          // 全完了
+          if (cutsceneModal) cutsceneModal.style.display = 'none';
+          if (btnCutsceneNext) btnCutsceneNext.removeEventListener('click', onNext);
+          onComplete?.();
+          return;
+        }
+        render();
+      }
+
+      render();
+      if (cutsceneModal) cutsceneModal.style.display = 'flex';
+      if (btnCutsceneNext) {
+        // 重複リスナー防止のためcloneで置換
+        const newBtn = btnCutsceneNext.cloneNode(true);
+        btnCutsceneNext.parentNode.replaceChild(newBtn, btnCutsceneNext);
+        newBtn.addEventListener('click', onNext);
+      }
+    }
 
     // --- 2. ゲーム状態管理 ---

+    function giveFixedRelic(relicId, cutsceneScenes, onDone) {
+      const relic = RELIC_DB[relicId];
+      if (!relic) { onDone?.(); return; }
+      showCutscene(cutsceneScenes, () => {
+        if (!player.relics.includes(relicId)) player.relics.push(relicId);
+        logMessage(`「${relic.name}」を手に入れた！`, 'log-system');
+        // レリック即時効果の適用
+        if (relicId === 'yubiwa_gold') { player.maxHp += 1; player.hp = Math.min(player.hp, player.maxHp); }
+        if (relicId === 'yubiwa_silver') { player.maxMp += 1; }
+        showGameAlert('レリック入手', `「${relic.name}」を入手しました！<br><span style="font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--text-muted);">${relic.desc}</span>`, () => {
+          onDone?.();
+        });
+      });
+    }

     import { ITEM_DB } from '../../../data/roguelike/items';
     import { enemyTemplates, getEnemyTemplate } from '../../../data/roguelike/enemies';
 
+    // ===================================================
+    // Audio コストger
+    // ===================================================
+    const BGM_PATH = '/portfolio/roguelike/assets/audio/bgm/';
+    const SE_PATH = '/portfolio/roguelike/assets/audio/se/';
+    
+    const BGM_DB = {
+      'start': 'maou_game_theme14.mp3',
+      'reward': 'maou_game_event04.mp3',
+      'castle': 'maou_game_castle01.mp3',
+      'inn': 'maou_game_village01.mp3',
+      'town': 'maou_game_town01.mp3',
+      'forest': 'maou_game_dangeon13.mp3',
+      'area1': 'maou_game_field05.mp3',
+      'area2': 'maou_game_field11.mp3',
+      'area3': 'maou_game_field07.mp3',
+      'battle': 'maou_game_battle07.mp3',
+      'boss': 'maou_game_boss02.mp3',
+      'lastboss': 'maou_game_boss06.mp3',
+      'bandit_pre': 'maou_game_dangeon07.mp3',
+      'darkelf_pre': 'maou_game_dangeon22.mp3',
+      'golem_pre': 'maou_game_dangeon01.mp3',
+      'vampire_pre': 'maou_game_dangeon17.mp3',
+      'leviathan_pre': 'maou_game_dangeon15.mp3',
+      'maou_pre': 'maou_game_dangeon04b.mp3'
+    };
+    
+    const SE_DB = {
+      'relic': 'maou_game_jingle09.mp3',
+      'inn': 'maou_game_jingle07.mp3',
+      'victory': 'maou_game_jingle01.mp3',
+      'defeat': 'maou_game_jingle08.mp3'
+    };
+
+    let currentBgmAudio = null;
+    let configBgmVolume = 0.5;
+    let configSeVolume = 0.5;
+
+    function playBGM(bgmId, fadeOutMs = 1000) {
+      if (!BGM_DB[bgmId]) return;
+      const url = BGM_PATH + BGM_DB[bgmId];
+      if (currentBgmAudio && currentBgmAudio.src.endsWith(url)) return;
+
+      const playNext = () => {
+        currentBgmAudio = new Audio(url);
+        currentBgmAudio.loop = true;
+        currentBgmAudio.volume = configBgmVolume;
+        currentBgmAudio.play().catch(e => console.log('BGM Play blocked:', e));
+      };
+
+      if (currentBgmAudio && fadeOutMs > 0) {
+        const steps = 10;
+        const stepTime = fadeOutMs / steps;
+        const volStep = currentBgmAudio.volume / steps;
+        let stepCount = 0;
+        const oldAudio = currentBgmAudio;
+        currentBgmAudio = null;
+        const interval = setInterval(() => {
+          stepCount++;
+          if (oldAudio.volume > volStep) oldAudio.volume -= volStep;
+          if (stepCount >= steps) {
+            clearInterval(interval);
+            oldAudio.pause();
+            playNext();
+          }
+        }, stepTime);
+      } else {
+        if (currentBgmAudio) {
+          currentBgmAudio.pause();
+        }
+        playNext();
+      }
+    }
+
+    function stopBGM() {
+      if (currentBgmAudio) {
+        currentBgmAudio.pause();
+        currentBgmAudio = null;
+      }
+    }
+
+    function playSE(seId) {
+      if (!SE_DB[seId]) return;
+      const se = new Audio(SE_PATH + SE_DB[seId]);
+      se.volume = configSeVolume;
+      se.play().catch(e => console.log('SE Play blocked:', e));
+    }
+
+    function setBgmVolume(vol) {
+      configBgmVolume = vol;
+      if (currentBgmAudio) currentBgmAudio.volume = vol;
+    }
+
+    function setSeVolume(vol) {
+      configSeVolume = vol;
+    }
+
+
     // --- 1. DOM要素の取得 ---
     const gameHeader = document.getElementById('game-header');
     const headerFloor = document.getElementById('header-floor');
[diff_block_end]

+        if (bgmVolumeInput) {
+          bgmVolumeInput.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
+            configBgmVolume = parseFloat(e.target.value) / 100;
+          });
+        }
     })();
   </script>

+    function loadSaveData() {
+      const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
+      if (saved) {
+        try { saveData = { ...saveData, ...JSON.parse(saved) }; } catch(e){}
+      }
+      if(!saveData.levels) saveData.levels = { sword: 1, shield: 1, mage: 1 };
+      updateMapUI();
+      updateUpgradeUI();
+      updateDeckUI();
+    }
+
+    function saveGame() {
+      localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(saveData));
+      updateMapUI();
+      updateUpgradeUI();
+      updateDeckUI();
+    }
+
+    const BASE_UNIT_DB = {
+      'sword':  { cost: 50,  hp: 100, attack: 15, cooldown: 1000, speed: 50, color: 0x0000FF, width: 40, height: 40, attackSE: 'strike' },
+      'shield': { cost: 80,  hp: 300, attack: 5,  cooldown: 1500, speed: 30, color: 0x4B0082, width: 50, height: 50, attackSE: 'smite' },
+      'mage':   { cost: 120, hp: 40,  attack: 30, cooldown: 2000, speed: 40, color: 0x8A2BE2, width: 35, height: 35, attackSE: 'magic' }
+    };
+
+    function getUnitData(type) {
+      const base = BASE_UNIT_DB[type];
+      const lv = saveData.levels[type];
+      return {
+        ...base,
+        hp: Math.floor(base.hp * (1 + (lv - 1) * 0.2)),
+        attack: Math.floor(base.attack * (1 + (lv - 1) * 0.2))
+      };
+    }

+    function setGamePause(paused) {
+      const scene = game.scene.getScene('MainScene');
+      if (!scene) return;
+      if (paused) {
+        if (scene.scene.isActive()) scene.scene.pause();
+      } else {
+        const isStart = document.getElementById('start-screen').style.display !== 'none';
+        const isMap = document.getElementById('map-screen').style.display === 'flex';
+        const isUpg = document.getElementById('upgrade-screen').style.display === 'flex';
+        const isRes = document.getElementById('result-screen').style.display === 'flex';
+        if (!isStart && !isMap && !isUpg && !isRes) {
+          scene.scene.resume();
+        }
+      }
+    }
